name: Retaliation
descriptionTemplate: When friendly troops within 1 grid around you are killed in battle, you will gain the Vengeance status, with attack +X for 2 turns.

progression.renderedDesc: When friendly troops within 1 grid around you are killed in battle, you will gain the Vengeance status, with attack +6 for 2 turns.
